title: [Let's Do] Meadow
description: A Mod offering a slight overhaul for the meadow biome by adding two new sub biomes and introducing the process of crafting cheese.
body:
![Meadow](https://lets-do.ch/assets/mod-logos/meadow.png)

Cottage Cheese & Wonderful Meadows

The mod that adds cheese to the Let's Do collection


"Pressed with care, aged with time"


Meadow adds a variety of things all based on life in the Alps with plenty of quality of life. You tend the herd, milk the cows, and press the cheese. It's all you.
Cheese is the only pressing matter. Enjoy life on the meadow.
Meadow is one of the oldest mods of the Let's Do collection and serves to give players a quaint biome to retreat to as well as the ability to make cheese.
## Milking the Herd
- Variety of new animals including variants of cows - More milk for all of your cheesy desires - A felting needle to felt wool into beautiful *new* wool - A Watering Can to speed up crop growth - A Woodcutter that works similarly to Vanilla's Stonecutter
Grab your bucket, get to milking.
## Pressing the Cheese
- A variety of cheeses to savor all your cheese needs - A Fondue to dip your bread in - A Cheesepress to press your milk into cheese - A Cooking Cauldron to cook some delicious meals
The only acceptable reinvention of the wheel is a wheel of cheese.
## Decorative Elements
- A set of Pine Wood including various furniture elements - Some leaded glass with fancy patterns - A wheel barrow, milk cans, fire logs, and many more thematical decorations - A variety of new bed types made from the new felted wool - A handful of flora to brighten up your world

Milk the cows.

Press the cheese.

Savor the taste, one bite at a time.


Dedicated to MissLilitu


# The Let’s Do Collection

# Support & Community

Let’s Do grows through its community.


GitHub • Discord • Patreon
